webservice.description: Returns the authenticated user's Stripe subscription details including tier, status, customer ID, and current period end
webservice.auth: Bearer token required — returns 401 if missing or invalid

outputs.current_period_end: string — ISO 8601 date when current billing period ends

guarantees: Returns 401 if Authorization header is missing
Returns 401 if Bearer token is invalid or expired
status is always one of: active, past_due, cancelled
tier is always one of: free, dragon, enterprise
stripe_customer_id is present for paid tiers (null for free)
Response time < 2s (DB lookup, no Stripe API in hot path)
owasp_guarantees: No token → 401 (not 200 with another user's subscription)
User A's token cannot access User B's Stripe customer ID

frontend_dependencies: web/settings.html → subscription section (tier badge, renewal date, cancel button)
evidence_notes: CLAUDE.md billing rule: No billing without consent. Stripe customer ID is PII — endpoint must be auth-gated. James Bach: what does a subscription mean when past_due? Verify all status transitions are representable.
